flashcards.q: What determines a precise location in geometry?
What is the shortest path between two points?

flashcards.a: A line segment extended indefinitely in both directions.
A portion of a line that has a starting point and goes on endlessly in one direction.

flashcards.q: What is an angle formed by?
flashcards.a: Two rays with a common starting point (vertex).

flashcards.q: What is the measure of a straight angle?
What is the degree measure of a right angle?

flashcards.a: An angle smaller than a right angle ($< 90^\circ$).
An angle greater than $90^\circ$ but less than $180^\circ$.
An angle greater than $180^\circ$ but less than $360^\circ$.
Two lines that meet at right angles ($90^\circ$).

flashcards.q: In naming $\angle XYZ$, which letter represents the vertex?

flashcards.a: A line that divides a given angle into two equal parts.

flashcards.q: What is the angle between the hands of a clock at 2 o'clock?
How many degrees are in a full rotation?
